    Check Out What Our Customers Are Saying!

    Priya N.

    Top-notch quality! Absolutely love it!

    "I am extremely happy with my Indus Valley cookware! The quality is outstanding, and I love that it's made from natural materials. It's perfect for everyday cooking, and the food tastes even better. The design is elegant, and it’s easy to clean. I highly recommend this to anyone looking for safe, durable, and chemical-free cookware."

    Amit R.

    Perfect for healthy cooking!

    "I’ve switched to Indus Valley cookware because I wanted something that promotes healthier cooking. This product exceeds expectations! It heats evenly, doesn't stick, and I feel confident using it knowing there are no harmful chemicals. It’s super easy to clean too. I’ve noticed a difference in the taste of my food, and it's definitely a healthier option. Worth every penny!"

    Neha S.

    Great value for money!

    "Indus Valley cookware has been a game-changer in my kitchen. It's solid and well-made, yet surprisingly easy to handle. It works wonderfully on both gas and induction cooktops. I’ve been using it for months now, and there’s no sign of wear. The price is very reasonable for the quality you’re getting. Highly recommend this to anyone looking for eco-friendly and safe cookware!"

    Rahul T.

    Safe and eco-friendly, love it!

    "As someone who’s trying to lead a more sustainable lifestyle, Indus Valley cookware was an easy choice. I love that it’s made from natural, non-toxic materials, and it’s free of chemicals like Teflon. The cookware heats up quickly and evenly, making cooking a breeze. Plus, it looks so stylish in my kitchen! Couldn’t be happier with this purchase."

    Meena K.

    Excellent craftsmanship and durability

    "The craftsmanship of Indus Valley cookware is impeccable. I’ve been using it for several months now, and it shows no signs of wear. The food cooks perfectly without sticking, and the flavors are richer. I also appreciate that it’s free from harmful chemicals. The durability is unmatched, and it’s so easy to maintain. I’m extremely satisfied and will be buying more from this brand!"

    Arjun M.

    Cooking has never been easier!

    "I bought the Indus Valley cookware set, and I am thoroughly impressed. The even heat distribution makes cooking faster, and the food doesn’t stick at all. Cleaning is effortless, and I love that it’s free from any toxic materials. The design is sleek, and it fits perfectly with my kitchen decor. It’s now my go-to cookware for all my meals!"

    Read All

    Collapsible content

    The Indus Valley Cookware - The Best Cooking Utensils For Health

    Having a balanced diet and proper food habits are just not enough to maintain a healthy lifestyle. The way you are particular about choosing the best foods and doing exercise regularly to keep fit, you must seriously think about the kind of kitchenware items being used - including kitchen masala box or cutting board. Yes, the nature of kitchen products also contributes towards improving one’s living and overall wellbeing.

    Wondering Which Cooking Utensil Material Is Best For Health?

    Don’t worry, The Indus Valley has all the answers. This article revolves around this very concept of using healthy cookware. In support of that, we will be discussing the downside of nonstick cookware, besides highlighting some of the best cooking material for health. True, that nonstick cookware offers a lot of features and visual appeal - it looks good, is lightweight, has a smooth surface and is very simple to use. Thus, cooking in nonstick kitchen vessels is a quite enjoyable and fulfilling. But, on a serious note, there’s a harsh truth behind nonstick cookware, be a tava or a cooking pan or an induction kadai.

    For starters, most non-stick kitchen essentials are coated with a Teflon coating that is filled with harmful chemicals such as PFAS. Medical experts even call them "forever chemicals." Why so? Because once these substances have entered our bodies, they remain there indefinitely. Doctors have also stated that using a nonstick cookware set on a regular basis increases the risk of cancer. If discarded as garbage, they will take an eternity to degrade, damaging the ecosystem.

    As a matter of fact, when Teflon home utensils are heated over a very high flame, they emit invisible and odourless gases that are extremely harmful, even to household pets. So you can see, a seemingly innocent nonstick cookware or even a non stick spatula is really dangerous and not good for health, living beings and the environment. Having said that, it can be understood that using nonstick cookware cannot be stopped immediately. But one can take measures to use it carefully. The first step is to change your cookware that includes induction utensils in nonstick. The Indus Valley has a wide range of cookware that are safe for health as well as meet your daily cooking needs.

    Which is The Best Cookware for Health!

    The best cooking utensils are those which do not have artificial or chemical coatings, are both food safe and health friendly and built with premium food-grade materials. The Indus Valley has different choices in toxin-free cookware and that are truly healthier than non-stick ones.

    Cast Iron Cookware

    Cast iron cookware is the best and healthier alternative to chemical coated utensils. To those who are thinking what is cast iron, then basically it is an iron-carbon alloy with more than 2% of carbon in it. Major components of cast iron are Pig iron (95%), magnesium, capsaicin, limestone, carbon and scrap (mostly, rejected cookware pieces). And answering to the question, is cast iron good for health - it is a big YES!

    Scientifically it has been proven that cast iron cookware releases iron content in food. Iron is important to promote good health and majorly helps in fighting iron deficiency. It transfers only the right amount of iron as required by a healthy person. Besides the health angle, cast iron cookware makes dishes tastier because it tends to add distinct flavour to food. It is good in even heat distribution and heat retention.

    All The Indus Valley cast iron cookware online are pre-seasoned with 100% vegetable oil. This makes the cast iron cookware non-stick naturally. Enables you to use new cast iron utensils without any hassles. No food sticking or burning.

    Nonstick cookware has a delicate coating that wears away with regular use. Cast iron cookware actually gets better with time. In fact, its natural non-stick surface becomes smoother with daily usage and seasoning. To know how to season cast iron cookware, click here.

    Here are various choices in cast iron cookware for you at The Indus Valley.

    9 Types of Cast Iron Utensils

    1. Cast Iron Kadai

    Trust Indus Valley kadhai to be the best cast iron kadai online! Use the cast iron kadai for deep frying samosas, pakora or other savouries, sabzi, dal curry, meat gravy, rice cuisines, etc. Super strong construction and superior performance together makes it the best cast iron kadai in India.

    2. Cast Iron Tawa

    Buy Indus Valley cast iron dosa tawa online to enhance your cooking experience. Whether you use cast iron tawa for dosa or roti or paratha, it will give you superior cooking results consistently. Pre-seasoned with vegetable oil, the tawa (or dosa kal or kallu in south India) won’t give you any burning or food sticking problems. Cleaning dosa tawa thus becomes easy as well. Make this best dosa tawa option yours now! Besides dosa pan, you will find different tawa varieties such as cast iron roti tawa and chapati tawa, cast iron uttapam/set dosa tawa, fish fry tawa and more.

    3. Cast Iron Frying pan

    If you are particular about having fry pan of natural material, then buy pre seasoned cast iron skillet at Indus Valley. Made of pure cast iron, this heavy-duty induction frying pan can last for generations. As the best cast iron frying pan, you can use the skillet pan for stir-frying veggies, paneer tikka, kebab, pasta, chicken curry, etc.

    4. Cast Iron Grill Pan

    This cast iron grill pan is best for making grilled cheese sandwich, kebab, paneer tikka, chicken roast, etc. Because of pre-seasoning and smooth finish, you can effortlessly make any kind of grilled snack. Explore website for choosing size and grill pan price that suits you.

    5. Cast Iron Appam Pan

    The Indus Valley’s Cast iron appam pan gives perfectly textured appams with authentic taste. The cast iron appam maker is best to make a variety of appams like Vellappam, egg appam, coconut appam, rava appam, etc.

    6. Cast Iron Paniyaram Pan

    Cast iron kuzhi paniyaram pan will give you excellent cooking results besides iron-rich paniyarams. You can try a variety of food with this paniyaram or appe pan. Like vegetable or masala paniyaram, corn balls, sweet or banana paniyaram, kerala unniyappam, paneer balls, etc.

    7. Cast Iron Dutch Oven

    The Dutch Oven is a multipurpose cookware of which you can use both the pot and lid for cooking and serving purposes. It is ideal for making biryani or any rice cuisines, cakes, spaghetti, chicken gravy. The cast iron dutch oven is in fact best for simmering, boiling or dishes that need slow cooking.

    8. Cast Iron Tadka Pan

    Tadka pan, a household go-to cookware, is very useful for seasoning food. With Indus Valley tadka pan you will not only add distinct flavour to your dishes but also enrich it with iron!

    9. Cast Iron Fish Fry Pan

    The fish fry pan in cast is another great cookware for daily use. Apart from fish fry, you can use this cast iron pan to prepare a variety of dishes effortlessly like paneer tikka, veg cutlet and more.

    Iron Cookware

    Same as cast iron, iron cookware is really beneficial for health as well as daily cooking. Both cast iron and iron cookware share similar features and health benefits. However, iron cookware is relatively lighter than cast iron utensils.

    5 Types of Iron Cookware

    1. Iron Kadai

    Choose The Indus Valley’s pre seasoned iron kadai for good health and convenience. As the best iron kadai online, you can effortlessly make sabzi, upma, samosa, gravy and so on. No worries of changing kadhai like non-stick cookware. Because this Indus Valley gas & induction kadai is really strong and long-lasting. Explore website to find iron kadai price and size that you prefer.

    2. Iron Tawa

    At The Indus Valley you can find a variety of iron tawas such as iron dosa tawa, concave roti tawa, C-handle iron roti tawa or tawa with long handle, multipurpose induction tawa and more. Explore to get the best tawa price that suits your needs.

    3. Iron Frying Pan

    The Indus Valley’s iron pan with wooden handle is multipurpose that can be used on both gas and induction. It is useful to make sabzi, hakka noodles, gravy, omelette or shallow fry snacks.

    4. Iron Tadka Pan

    Besides seasoning dishes, the iron tadka pan is good for dishes that need frying, searing or browning food. Very handy and durable, the iron pan has a smooth finish and consumes less oil for cooking.

    5. Iron Wok

    The iron wok has different names like wok pan or curry wok. Some even call it chinese wok or a chinese kadai because it is mostly used to make chinese fast food like hakka noodles or fried rice. Although not induction friendly, the iron wok can be used on gas stove, OTG and campfire.

    Stainless Steel Cookware

    After cast iron and iron cookware, tri ply stainless steel cookware follows immediately in terms of toxin-free cooking. Made of 3 layers of metals, the premium grade stainless steel cookware has no chemical coating. It is rust-free, super strong, scratch resistant and durable for lifelong healthy cooking.

    Different Stainless Steel Cooking Utensils At The Indus Valley

    1. Tri-Ply Stainless Steel Fry Pan

    Stop using stainless steel non-stick cookware; instead try The Indus Valley tri ply stainless steel pan! The steel fry pan is the best choice when it comes to making stir-fried veggies, paneer tikka, browning, searing meat, omelettes and more. Promising cooking results compared to normal stainless steel pan. Check out website for best frying pan price for your daily cooking.

    2. Tri Ply Stainless Steel Kadai

    Looking for a durable heavy bottom stainless steel kadai india for everyday cooking? With The Indus Valley toxin-free triply kadai, you can cook gravies, curries like dal, sabzi, or deep fry snacks like french fries. Perfectly convenient for frying vegetables, browning, searing meat, and making omelettes. Truly healthy & best stainless steel kadai!

    3. Tri Ply Stainless Steel Biryani Pot

    The tri ply stainless steel casserole or stockpot or biryani pot is really good for preparing food that needs long duration for simmering like a variety of rice cuisines, soups, spaghetti, stocks, broths, pasta, etc. If you are looking for superior quality steel casserole or biryani pot online, then you are in the right place!

    4. Tri Ply Stainless Steel Saucepan

    Use this steel saucepan for tea or coffee and to boil milk. The sauce pan is also good for preparing soups and sauces, kheer, payasam, noodles or any other dish in small quantities.

    5. Tri Ply Stainless Steel Tasla

    The stainless steel mixing bowl / steel kadai without handle is great for kneading dough with ease, minimal cooking like frying puris, soaking gulab jamuns or best for serving purpose. If you are searching for high quality durable steel bowls online, your search ends here!

    6. Tri Ply Stainless Steel Tope

    The triply stainless steel tope is suitable for boiling milk, kneading dough, basic cooking like sambar, frying puris or even soaking gulab jamuns. The big steel bowl is also ideal for serving food.

    7. Tri Ply Stainless Steel Wok

    The triply wok is best for stir-frying, sauteing, roasting, simmering, etc. Cook fried rice, stir-fried veggies, pasta, halwa, etc. effortlessly. If you want to buy wok online that’s strong and durable, then try this!

    8. Tri Ply Stainless Steel Saucepot

    The stainless steel saucepot is convenient for boiling milk, kneading dough and for basic cooking including making sambar, frying puris or soaking gulab jamuns. It also offers an excellent serving purpose like a steel casserole.

    Premium Stainless Steel Pressure Cooker

    Apart from natural material cooking pots and steel induction pans, The Indus Valley has multiple choices in stainless steel pressure cooker. They are:

    • 1. Premium Triply Stainless Steel Outer Lid Pressure Cooker 1.5 litre/3 litre/5 litre
    • 2. Premium Stainless Steel Inner Lid Pressure Cooker with Triply Sandwich Bottom - 3/5Litre

    Each of them, including pressure cooker 3 litre capacity and pressure cooker 5 litre, is the best cooker in India because they are better than aluminium cookers. In terms of non-reactive nature and does not react with food. You can also find on website for pressure cooker combo offer with a combination of 3 litre cooker and 5 litre cooker or any other set with cooker price of your choice. Embrace healthy cooking rituals by buying the best rice cooker in India that is toxin-free.

    Why Use The Indus Valley Pressure Cooker?

    • HEALTHY PRESSURE COOKER: The Indus Valley pressure cooker is made from 100% food-safe materials. Totally free from toxic coatings or artificial chemicals.
    • QUALITY ASSURANCE: All Indus Valley’s high-grade 304 stainless steel pressure cookers are ISI & ISO 9001 Certified.
    • PRESERVES NUTRIENTS: Thick body of the cooker allows even heating and prevents loss of nutrients and vitamins in steam.
    • MULTI-PURPOSE: Convenience and versatility mean you can prepare everything from a simple dal to a satisfying biryani in less than 30 minutes. If you are looking for a reliable induction pressure cooker, then get it from The Indus Valley.
    • STRONG & DURABLE: The premium quality food-grade stainless steel pressure cookers have a strong build. They won’t go out of shape. The Indus Valley’s pressure cooker will last for years.
    • SAVES TIME: Food cooks four times faster than ordinary cooking methods.
    • SAVES MONEY: Superfast cooking means lower gas bills, besides preserving the flavour, natural colour and essential nutrients of the foods you prepare. Plus, it turns cuts of meat into juicy tender, tasty meals.
    • SAVES ENERGY: It is even good for the environment because reduced cooking time conserves energy.
    • EASY TO USE & CLEAN: Both the stainless steel pressure cookers are suitable for daily cooking. They are easy to clean and have no hard-to-clean areas. Plus, they are Dishwasher friendly. So, really easy to use, clean as well as maintain!

    So, if you are tired of looking for the best pressure cooker in India, The Indus Valley has the healthy solution. Check out the website to get the best pressure cooker price or combo of your choice.

    Copperware

    In the category of natural kitchenware, copperware is another best alternative to replace non-stick or plastic kitchen essentials. Copper vessels help in boosting health as it releases some amount of copper in food/water. At The Indus Valley, you have multiple choices in copper products. They are:

    • Pure Copper Water Bottle with Lacquer finish
    • Copper bottle with hammered or diamond-cut design
    • Copper Oreo 1 litre water bottle
    • Copper jug
    • Copper Serving Bowl with steel lining
    • Copper dinner set - includes plate, bowls & spoon
    • Visit copper page to get the best copper water bottle or copper jug price that fits your family needs.

    Multiple Choices of Healthy Drinkware

    Besides kitchenware, there are healthy choices in hydro flask water bottle or vacuum insulated flask, black coffee mug, electric kettle, premium pro-hydro borosilicate glass bottle and so on. Here’s a brief outline about some of them.

    Vacuum Insulated Stainless Steel Drinkware

    1. Premium Stainless Steel Water Bottle

    The 2.2 L water bottle is made from 18/8 premium, food-grade stainless steel. It has no harmful chemical coatings. It is 100% BPA-free. One of the best water bottles at The Indus Valley that gives only the pure taste of water.

    2. Pro-Hydro Stainless Steel Vacuum Insulated Water Bottle Flask

    This vacuum insulated flask (900mL) comes with a 150 mL capacity storage container. Made of 18/8 premium stainless steel, the hydro flask water bottle is non-toxic and rust-free. It is SGS and TUV Rheinland certified. The leak-proof thermosteel flask is best to keep beverages ice-cold for 12 hours and hot for up to 8 hours.

    3. Pro-hydro Stainless Steel Vacuum Insulated Wide Mouth Water Bottle

    Another variation of the above one is the Pro-hydro Stainless Steel Vacuum Insulated Wide Mouth Water Bottle. Although it shares similar features this one doesn’t have storage cup. The hot and cold water bottle 1ltr is leak-proof, easy to carry and best to carry hot-cold beverages for different seasons.

    4. Premium Stainless Steel Camo Printed Vacuum Insulated Water Bottle

    This Cola Shaped bottle with camouflage design is of 1000 ml capacity. Easy to carry bottle, it keeps cold drinks cold for 12 hours and hot ones hot for up to 12 hours. The vacuum insulated bottle has a cool touch body. It is anti-slip and leak-proof.

    5. Pro-hydro Stainless Steel Vacuum Insulated Flask with Drinking Mug Lid

    A very compact flask of 500 mL capacity, this drinkware is made of 304 grade stainless steel - totally BPA-free and chemical free. With a cool touch body, the insulated flask is rust resistant and leak-proof. Keeps beverages cold for 12 hours and hot for up to 10 hours. Helps you to stay hydrated on the go because the flask comes with a drinking mug lid.

    6. Pro-hydro Vacuum Insulated Stainless Steel Water Bottle Narrow Mouth

    Trust this one to be your go-to water bottle! It not only looks impressive but is also compact to fit any bag as well as car cup holders. The 500ml capacity stainless steel water bottle is made of 304 grade stainless steel, is 100% food-safe and BPA-free. With double walled vacuum insulation, the hydro flask water bottle keeps hot drinks hot for up to 6 hours and cold for 10 hours.

    7. Pro-hydro Vacuum Insulated School Kids Water Bottle

    A cute addition in The Indus Valley range of drinkware, this school water bottle comes with a Silicone Sipper and Bag. Made of 304 grade stainless steel, the 450ml capacity children water bottle has a leak-proof lid. The double-walled insulation helps to keep cold drinks cold for 8 hours and hot ones for up to 6 hours. Truly healthier than plastic bottles!

    8. Premium Stainless Steel Vacuum Insulated Travel Coffee Mug

    Looking to buy coffee mugs online or searching for gift mugs? Then Indus Valley’s mug will turn out to be the best coffee mugs you will ever find. The 350ml stainless steel coffee mug has double-wall insulation that helps to keep your beverages cold for 8 hrs and hot for up to 4 hrs. Available in 3 colours - Black, Red, Green - pick your choice of coffee cups with lids for daily use.

    9. Premium Pro-hydro Borosilicate Glass Bottle

    The Indus Valley’s recently launched Premium Pro-hydro Borosilicate Glass Bottle is very impressive in looks and convenience. It is made of premium grade borosilicate glass which is clean, food-grade, odour-free and stain-free. With a BPA-free sleeve makes it have a shatterproof body. The glass water bottle is leak-proof and has a built-in handle on its lid. Making it easy to carry anywhere you want. The perfect toxin-free, go-to water bottle for men and women alike!

    More Alternatives in Best Cooking Material for Health

    Wooden Kitchenware
